description: Use this API to set switched shunt real extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = set_ext_swshunt_real(ibus, shntid, string, rval)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension swshunt field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘RVAL’ not set.
Unknown error with data access; ‘RVAL’ not set.
API Prereqs not met; ‘RVAL’ not set.
